name: @alfred-labs/memory-e2e
description: Reproducible E2E environment for validating Alfred Memory with Codex/MCP, ChatGPT Actions and PostgreSQL.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/start-memory-server.js && node --check scripts/run-migrations.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-codex.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-chatgpt.mjs
scripts.test: node --check scripts/start-memory-server.js && node --check scripts/run-migrations.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-codex.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-chatgpt.mjs
